news.t: How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 2Q23

holdings.infoBox: FXU is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Pinnacle West Capital stock at 4.38%, Eversource Energy at 4.27%, Edison International at 4.21%, Consolidated Edison at 4.07%, and PG&E Corporation at 4.03%.

overview.description: The First Trust Utilities AlphaDEX Fund (FXU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Utilities index. The fund tracks a tiered, equal-weighted index of large- and mid-cap utility firms in the US. Holdings are selected and weighted based on growth and value metrics. FXU was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 2Q23
data.text: With an ever-growing list of similar-sounding ETFs to choose from, finding the best is an increasingly difficult task. My report shows the top-rated ETF for each sector.

data.title: Best Value ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best value ETFs for Q1 2021 are FXU, DFE, and IQIN.
